_meta.name: Main 31 Phase 0 hardware-corpus extraction schemas
_meta.purpose: Extract structured records from Main 27-30 hardware research session reports. Three schemas of increasing difficulty.

schema_1_hardware_measurement.description: Structured quantitative measurement of an Apple Silicon hardware property.

property.description: What is being measured. Free text but should be a precise property name.

value.description: Numeric measurement. Always a number, not a range. Use the midpoint for ranges.

measurement_method.description: How the measurement was taken. Should reference the tool or technique.

session.description: Which session produced this measurement. Format: 'Main NN [thread/agent if applicable]'

confidence.description: high = direct measurement reproducible across runs; medium = single measurement or derived; low = inferred or estimated

source_file.description: Vault path to the document containing this measurement.

supersedes.description: If this measurement replaces an earlier one, name the prior measurement and its source. null if novel.
examples: 12-way SLC from CTRL2 mask width (Main 26 amcc_register_analysis.md)

schema_2_dead_path.description: Record of a hypothesis that was tested and killed (or revived/sharpened). Captures the reasoning + evidence.

path_name.description: Short identifier for the dead path. Should match the dead-paths table entry if one exists.

original_hypothesis.description: What the proposed lever or finding was, in one sentence.

evidence_against.description: What the measurement showed, in 1-3 sentences. Quote numbers when present.

evidence_session.description: Session that produced the killing evidence. Format: 'Main NN [thread]'.

scope.description: What EXACTLY is dead. Should not be broader than the measurement supports. Avoid vague universal claims.
examples: DCS writes have no measured effect ON ANE specifically (per-agent effect on TB/PCIe/CPU/GPU not measured)
encodeCacheHintTag dead for batched-dispatch GPU pipelines (the original 71-87% wins required one-dispatch-per-CB pattern that no production path uses)

remaining_leads.description: Open questions or revival conditions. null if path is fully closed.
examples: RE the slot-index-to-agent map from IODeviceTree mcc-channels

schema_3_architectural_finding.description: Synthesis-level finding that crosses multiple measurements or sessions. Captures the evidence chain and implications.

examples: The SLC is a high-bandwidth streaming gateway, not a working-set cache.
ANE has two physical NoC links, both active and balanced during inference.

detail.description: 2-3 sentence explanation of what the finding actually says.

evidence_chain.description: Ordered list of measurements that build to this finding. Each item has a session, what was measured, and what came out.

implications.description: What this means for inference / future research / dead-path table updates.

contradicts.description: Prior findings or community claims this finding contradicts. null if novel without contradiction.

source_files.description: All vault files that contribute to this finding.
